paragraphs: Al Furqan Academy is a comprehensive Islamic educational platform designed to help Muslims of all ages learn, understand, and memorize the Holy Quran using modern technology and structured learning methodologies.
The platform provides guided Quran memorization programs, detailed Tajweed instruction, Arabic language education, and a rich collection of Islamic educational articles to support lifelong learning.
Special attention was given to user experience, accessibility, responsive design, and educational effectiveness, ensuring students can learn efficiently from any device.

The system includes personalized dashboards, progress tracking, achievement systems, revision schedules, and learning analytics that help students maintain consistency and improve their memorization journey.
Teachers and administrators are provided with powerful content management tools to organize lessons, monitor student progress, and deliver educational content effectively.
bullets: Developed a complete Quran memorization management system
Built secure authentication and user management
Implemented student achievement and certificate system
Integrated progress analytics and learning statistics
